title: Senexemon
description: Senexe's Modpack for Cobblemon. Meshes realistic Minecraft mods with Cobblemon-supported add-ons, as well as mods for builders like Supplementaries and Macaw's array.
body:
Senexemon is a 1.21 Cobblemon Modpack created for its newest release, 1.6. It has an array of game-enhancing mods that attempt to update Minecraft in a way that improves what is already there while adding on game-esque items, so as to not appear unrealistic compared to the base game. Mods that add blocks were chosen _specifically_ so they do not detract from the base game.

As time goes on, mods will be removed depending on newer versions of the major mods, or if major glitches are discovered.
